name: creative-production
description: Explore, build, and polish business-ready visual assets: mood boards, product scenes, ads, logos, charts, and videos.

interface.shortDescription: Create business-ready visuals from brief to production asset.
interface.longDescription: Creative Production helps you explore, build, and polish visuals for work: campaign mood boards, product or venue scenes, logo concepts, ad directions, shot routes, reusable styles, and publish-ready variants. It starts as a creative studio flow, then keeps the output business-useful by preserving selected concepts, reusable assets, and production-ready context.
defaultPrompt: Create a visual board and ad concept territories for this campaign brief.
Place this product or app in realistic scenes and use cases for launch.
Turn this ad or selected asset into polished variations for review.
